data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Encrypts the data transferred between user devices and servers.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Adds a layer of security for user logins beyond just username and password.
data.technical_spec: Supports time-based OTPs and U2F (hardware keys).

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Protects web applications by filtering and monitoring HTTP traffic.
data.technical_spec: Built with services like AWS WAF or Cloudflare.

data.title: Intrusion Detection System (IDS)
data.description: Monitors network for malicious activities or policy violations.

data.title: Data Encryption at Rest
data.description: Ensures stored data is encrypted to protect information from unauthorized access.
